message:
feat: add ChatGPT provider with mapping-tree and simple-messages support

Port ChatGPT connector from CASS, supporting both the mapping-based tree
format (node IDs with parent pointers) and the simpler messages-array
format. Includes reader, writer, detection, and 31 unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
